title: North Korean oppression remains a security strategy, not a side issue - Asia Times
summary: The prison camps, censorship system, forced labor networks and dynastic dictatorship remain what sustain its missile and nuclear programs.
contents:

> The prison camps, censorship system, forced labor networks and dynastic dictatorship remain what sustain its missile and nuclear programs.
